strategic_capability_mapping.relationship: Makes existing parent run.inspect and task.inspect output actionable for controlled child-set parent join readiness, including non-runnable child states that must not be rerun.
Lets unattended callers recover the next explicit task.run action from parent inspection after a missed child task.run response or process restart.

questions.prompt: Does existing parent run.inspect/task.inspect expose bounded controlled child-set parent join readiness?
Does parent inspection report runnable pending child task ids/count and run_remaining_child_tasks_explicitly only while controlled children are rerunnable?
Does parent inspection avoid rerun guidance for Running or Cancelled controlled children by exposing bounded non-runnable child ids and a distinct next action?
Does parent inspection report run_parent_task_explicitly only after all controlled children are terminal and before that result set is consumed?
Does parent inspection avoid TaskRunning, parent join consumption, handoff envelope, child TaskRecord, or child TaskRunning mutation?
Do M5.34, M5.32, M5.31, M5.30, M5.29, M5.27, in-budget recovery, and non-recovery behaviors remain intact?

Does this phase avoid raw prompts, provider output, file content, commands, stdout/stderr, env, raw tool input, raw payloads, scheduler handoff, auto-run, diagnostics RPCs, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, and workspace mutation paths?

answers.parent_inspection_join_readiness: Yes. Existing parent run.inspect and task.inspect can include parent_join_readiness_summary derived from runtime-owned controlled child TaskRecords.
answers.pending_child_next_action: Yes. When runnable pending controlled children exist, parent inspection reports parent_join_ready=false, bounded pending controlled child task ids/count, empty non-runnable child ids, and next_action=run_remaining_child_tasks_explicitly.
answers.non_runnable_child_next_action: Yes. When a controlled child is Running or Cancelled, parent inspection reports bounded non_runnable_controlled_child_task_ids/count and next_action=inspect_non_runnable_child_tasks instead of recommending an invalid rerun.
answers.ready_only_when_unconsumed: Yes. The parent inspection summary reports parent_join_ready=true and next_action=run_parent_task_explicitly only when every controlled child is Completed or Failed and the child result-set fingerprint has not already been consumed.
answers.read_only_inspection: Yes. The inspection path computes the summary without appending parent TaskRunning, consuming parent join state, recording handoff envelopes, creating child TaskRecords, or running child tasks.
answers.prior_phase_compatibility: Yes. M5.34 terminal child readiness, child-orchestration replay, first materialization, replay-safe recovery budget, over-budget recovery rejection, in-budget recovery child run, and non-controlled task behavior remain covered.
answers.safety_boundary: Yes. The summary exposes bounded ids/counts and next action only, with no raw goals, prompts, provider responses, file contents, command strings, stdout, stderr, environment values, raw tool input objects, serialized request bodies, raw failure payloads, scheduler handoff, auto-run, diagnostics wrapper RPC, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, or workspace mutation path.

exit_criteria: Existing parent run.inspect output returns bounded parent_join_readiness_summary for eligible parent runs.
Existing parent task.inspect output returns the same bounded parent_join_readiness_summary for eligible parent tasks.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes parent task id and parent run id.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes terminal controlled child count.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes pending controlled child count.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes pending controlled child task ids.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes non-runnable controlled child count.
The parent_join_readiness_summary includes non-runnable controlled child task ids.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports parent_join_ready=false when controlled children remain pending.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports next_action=run_remaining_child_tasks_explicitly only while runnable controlled children remain pending.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports next_action=inspect_non_runnable_child_tasks when Running or Cancelled controlled children would make rerun guidance invalid.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports parent_join_ready=true only when every controlled child is terminal and the result set is unconsumed.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports parent_running_enabled=false.
The parent_join_readiness_summary reports next_action=run_parent_task_explicitly only when every controlled child is terminal and the result set is unconsumed.
Parent inspection after parent join consumption does not expose stale run_parent_task_explicitly.
Parent inspection appends no parent TaskRunning event.
Parent inspection appends no parent join consumption or handoff envelope event.
Parent inspection creates no child TaskRecord.
Parent inspection runs no child task.
M5.34 terminal child readiness behavior remains intact.
M5.32 parent-join child-orchestration replay behavior remains intact.
M5.31 initial parent replay behavior remains intact.
M5.30 first materialization child-orchestration outcome behavior remains intact.
M5.29 replay-safe recovery-cycle budget outcome behavior remains intact.
M5.27 over-budget recovery-cycle child task.run still rejects before TaskRunning.
In-budget recovery-cycle child materialization and explicit task.run behavior still works.
Non-controlled, parentless, and standalone tasks do not expose parent readiness summaries.

No raw child prompts, parent prompts, provider responses, file contents, command strings, stdout, stderr, environment values, raw tool input objects, serialized request bodies, raw failure payloads, or unbounded error text are persisted or exposed.

No scheduler handoff, external worker, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, direct workspace mutation path, diagnostics wrapper RPC, parent auto-run, child auto-run, or new blocked summary wrapper is added.
